title: Uzbek Language AI Benchmark Scoring Rubric

scoring_dimensions.name: Linguistic Accuracy
scoring_dimensions.description: Grammatical correctness, proper Uzbek morphology, sentence structure

scoring_guide.20-25: Flawless Uzbek grammar, correct verb conjugation, proper case endings, no code-switching errors
scoring_guide.14-19: Minor grammatical errors that do not impede understanding; occasional incorrect morpheme
scoring_guide.8-13: Noticeable grammatical issues; some sentences are structurally incorrect
scoring_guide.1-7: Significant grammar errors; response is partially comprehensible
scoring_guide.0: Incoherent text, responded in wrong language, or refused to respond

scoring_dimensions.name: Register Compliance
scoring_dimensions.description: Appropriate use of slang/informal/formal register as required by the question

scoring_guide.20-25: Perfect register match; vocabulary, tone, and sentence style fully align with target register
scoring_guide.14-19: Mostly correct register with minor mixing (e.g., one formal phrase in informal context)
scoring_guide.8-13: Register is partially correct; noticeable mixing of styles
scoring_guide.1-7: Wrong register used; model defaulted to its standard output style
scoring_guide.0: Complete register failure or irrelevant response

scoring_dimensions.name: Cultural & Pragmatic Competence
scoring_dimensions.description: Understanding of Uzbek cultural context, idiomatic expressions, pragmatic norms

scoring_guide.17-20: Demonstrates deep cultural understanding; idioms used correctly; pragmatically appropriate
scoring_guide.12-16: Good cultural awareness with minor pragmatic gaps
scoring_guide.7-11: Limited cultural depth; some idioms misunderstood or misused
scoring_guide.1-6: Poor cultural competence; significant pragmatic errors

scoring_dimensions.name: Semantic Accuracy
scoring_dimensions.description: Correctness of meaning, factual accuracy of the response content

scoring_guide.17-20: Completely accurate answer addressing all aspects of the question
scoring_guide.12-16: Mostly accurate with minor omissions or imprecisions
scoring_guide.7-11: Partially correct; some key information missing or wrong
scoring_guide.0: Completely wrong or no meaningful answer

scoring_dimensions.name: Script & Orthography
scoring_dimensions.description: Correct use of Uzbek Latin script, proper apostrophe usage (ʻ, ʼ), correct spelling

scoring_guide.9-10: Perfect orthography; correct use of special characters (oʻ, gʻ); consistent script
scoring_guide.6-8: Minor spelling errors or inconsistent special character usage
scoring_guide.1-2: Systematic spelling errors; incorrect script usage
scoring_guide.0: Wrong script (Cyrillic where Latin expected or vice versa) or unintelligible

evaluation_process.step1: Automated pre-screening: script detection, language detection, length check
evaluation_process.step2: LLM-as-Judge: Claude Opus evaluates responses using this rubric (blind evaluation)
evaluation_process.step3: Human expert review: Native Uzbek speaker validates top/bottom 20% of scored responses
evaluation_process.step4: Consensus scoring: average of LLM-judge and human reviewer scores

aggregate_metrics.dimension_scores: Average score per dimension across all questions
